title: Force kick
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}}
{{MultipleIssues|citation|expand}}
'''Force Kick''' was a [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] that enabled the practitioner to perform a kick towards a target and thereby interrupt their actions through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], even if they were several meters apart. Some [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] were skilled in the ability.<ref name="TOR: Force Kick">{{TORcite|type=other|Force Kick}}</ref> [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] once used this ability against one of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]'s [[Unidentified mercenary pilot|henchmen]] during the [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]].<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|How could anyone possibly be bothered by my widely celebrated, perfectly executed Force-Kick?!|[[Mark Hamill]], via Twitter|<ref name="Tweet">{{Twitter|MarkHamill|status/1662529702207303680|Mark Hamill|date=27-05-2023|archivedate=20230527215830}}</ref>}}
[[File:Forcekickcomalive.gif|thumb|329px|The "Force kick" in ''Return of the Jedi'']]
"Force kick" first appeared in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], in which [[Mark Hamill]] as [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] kicks [[Unidentified mercenary pilot|one]] of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] henchmen in the head,<ref name="Tweet" /> causing him to fall into the [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]] pit while [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] is flying helplessly by in the background.<ref name="ROTJ" />

The choreography blooper consists of the stuntman reacting to the impact of the kick too late, when Hamill is already lowering his leg. The shooting 'flaw' consists of the camera being placed at an angle making it obvious that the kick did not actually hit the stuntman. The sequence is referred to as the "Force kick", which jokingly speculates that Luke uses [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force telekinesis]] to make the henchman fall into the sarlacc pit rather than the physical impact of the kick.

The Force kick was mentioned in ''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'', albeit as a joke,<ref name="Order 66">''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]''</ref> and appears in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' as a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] ability.<ref name="TOR: Force Kick" />

===The original "Force kick" sequence===
<gallery widths="250">
File:ForceKick-ROTJ.png|The kick is at its peak and would, in reality, have impacted on the kicked person. Notice the space between Hamill's foot and the stuntman.
File:ForceKick2-ROTJ.png|Hamill lowering his leg; only now does the stuntman react to the kick.
File:ForceKick3-ROTJ.png|The Force kick blooper is not always noticed, as focus is on Boba Fett's movement in the background.
File:ForceKick4-ROTJ.png|Hamill's foot back on the ground; the stuntman turns to fall into the sarlacc.
</gallery>
